faq.title: K-STOCK FAQ
faq.a1: Go to the Wallet tab, click Deposit, and copy your TRC20 or ERC20 wallet address. USDT will be automatically converted to KRW at the real-time rate upon arrival.
faq.a2: No, we use local encrypted storage for your simulation account. You can start trading immediately.
faq.q3: Which stock exchange does this cover?
faq.a3: We support all stocks listed on KOSPI and KOSDAQ with real-time price updates.
faq.a4: Korean market hours are 09:00 - 15:30 (KST). Market orders are only possible during these hours.
faq.a5: This is a digital asset linked platform. USDT is stored in secure cold wallets, and stock orders are executed through brokerage APIs.
faq.q6: How is the exchange rate calculated?
faq.a6: We use a blended rate from major global exchanges plus a 0.5% conversion spread.
faq.q7: Can I withdraw directly to USDT?
faq.a7: Yes, when you sell stocks, the KRW balance is converted back to USDT and sent to your whitelist address.
faq.q8: Is there a limit on trading volume?
faq.a8: Minimum trade is 10 USDT. Maximum volume depends on your account level (Default is 1,000,000 USDT).
faq.a9: Our AI analyzes market sentiment, news, and technical indicators to suggest high-potential stocks.
faq.a10: Currently we support Tron (TRC20), Ethereum (ERC20), and Solana (SPL).
faq.a11: Yes, our chat and news sections feature real-time AI translation for all supported languages.
faq.a12: Click the Tiffany Blue chat icon on the bottom left for 24/7 live assistance.
faq.a13: Platform fee is 0.1% per trade. Exchange fees may vary by network.
faq.q14: How to find specific Korean stocks?
faq.a14: Use the search bar with either the stock name (English/Korean) or the 6-digit ticker code.
faq.a15: You can follow top-performing traders and replicate their trades automatically.
faq.q16: Can I use this on mobile?
faq.a16: Yes, the platform is fully responsive and optimized for mobile browsers.
faq.a17: We comply with VASP and AML regulations for digital asset-based services.
faq.a18: Quotes are real-time for active traders. Delayed data may be shown to guest users.
faq.a19: Stock dividends are automatically credited to your balance in USDT form.
faq.a20: You can set automatic sell orders if the price drops below your specified threshold.
faq.a21: AI summarizes thousands of Korean financial news daily for your convenience.
faq.a22: We remove the need for Korean bank accounts and complex resident registrations.
faq.a23: We offer AI-guided portfolio rebalancing to maximize your ROI.
faq.a24: AI generates tax reports based on your country of residence for easy filing.
faq.a25: Users can trade USDT and stock positions directly through our escrow system.
faq.a26: For security, withdrawal addresses must be verified and whitelisted.
faq.a27: We provide API documentation for institutional traders and hedge funds.
faq.a29: We do not store personal ID data; all trading records are encrypted and pseudonymized.
faq.a30: Future updates include NFT-based stock ownership and DAO governance features.

chat.welcome: Hello! How can I help you today?
chat.admin_typing: Our team is reviewing your inquiry. Please stay tuned!
